user.description: Get a free API key at {api_key_url}. After the account is added, add monitoring stations to it from the integration page.

data_description.api_key: Your personal AirNow API key. The default key limit is 500 requests/hour; each configured station uses 4/hour.

reauth_confirm.description: The AirNow API rejected your key. Get a new one at {api_key_url}.

data_description.api_key: The replacement key is validated against the AirNow API before being saved.

reconfigure.description: Update the AirNow API key used for all stations. Get a key at {api_key_url}.

data_description.api_key: The new key is validated against the AirNow API before being saved. All stations on this account switch to it immediately.

abort.already_configured: An account with this API key is already configured

user.title: Find stations
user.description: Stations that reported data within ~25 km of these coordinates will be listed in the next step.

data_description.latitude: Center of the station search. Stations that reported data within roughly 25 km in the last 3 hours will be listed.
data_description.longitude: Defaults to your Home Assistant home location.

data_description.station: Sorted nearest-first. The station's measured parameters (ozone, PM, NO₂, …) determine which sensors are created.

error.no_stations: No stations reported data near these coordinates

abort.already_configured: This station is already configured (on this or another AirNow account entry)

invalid_api_key.message: The AirNow API key is invalid

api_error.message: Error communicating with the AirNow API: {error}
